ddt:Target.Name: ESC___1540-HFE-XZG_Version_2.2
ddt:Target.Description:
ESC GEN09 (Projet HFE-XZG) *************************************************** Pilot: - Aymeric BRUNEAU (+33-1-768-51254) - François NHAN
------------------------------------------------------------------ v2.2: - Addition of ACC/AEBPed functions inhibition states.
------------------------------------------------------------------ v2.1: - Addition of maintenance mode strategy (inhibition of ASR function on roller test bench) for DTC Snapshot
------------------------------------------------------------------ v2.0: - Addition of new Vdiag
------------------------------------------------------------------ v1.9: - Modification of manual bleeding.
------------------------------------------------------------------ v1.8: - Correction of Data Vehicle Status
------------------------------------------------------------------ v1.7: - Correction of HW BPL (=> 1 for 47851)
------------------------------------------------------------------ v1.6: - Addition of XZG and XZI ------------------------------------------------------------------ v1.5: - Update of AutoIdent - Modification of EG activation status bit - Addition of the Range H projects ------------------------------------------------------------------ v1.4: - Correction of AutoIdent
-------------------------------------------------------------------- v1.3: - Addition of DID $4B27 ParkingBrakeConfiguration
-------------------------------------------------------------------- v1.2: - Correction of DID $4B4E Vacuum value - Correction of Status bit DID - Addition of all functions in fuction status sreen - Correction of the number of bytes for Data ECU Activities -------------------------------------------------------------------- v1.1: - Addition of DTC $C414 / $C114 / $5187 / $5153 / $C412 - Revision of DID $4B35 format (6 bytes implemented) - Modification of HardwareNumber.BasicPartList to be compatible with the config sheet specification. add previous number 47850 / 47851 - Auto identification update - Addition of vaccum sensor value - Correction of hydraulic circuit check control - Addition of DTC$4021.7A : Brake booster performance -------------------------------------------------------------------- v1.0: - Creation of database based on X07 project

Data.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ResponseType
DTCStatus.testFailed
DTCStatus.testFailedThisMonitoringCycle
DTCStatus.pendingDTC
DTCStatus.confirmedDTC
DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear
DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear
DTCStatus.testNotCompletedThisMonitoringCycle
DTCStatus.warningIndicatorRequested
DTCFailureType.Category

Item.Text: FM (Freq Mod) / PWM (Pulse Width Mod) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFailureType

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Freq Mod) / PWM (Pulse Width Mod) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCDeviceIdentifier

Item.Text: Invalid ABS or ESC calibration parameter

Manual status response upon stop request

Manual status response upon start request
Press the gaz pedal and reach the engine RPM between 2000 rpm and 3000 rpm. Then, start the ASR control.

IOControl.Output command status

IOControl.Output command status
IOControl.Output command status
IOControl.Output command status

Label.Text: Repair bleed procedure - Secondary circuit bleeding procedure
-0-1- Place the device providing 2bar of pressure in the reservoir With No Brake Pedal Pressed
-1-1- Open the bleeder screw at the Rear Left wheel
-1-3- Start the RL bleeding procedure and wait 25s
-1-4- When there is no more air bubble, close the bleeding screw and go to step 2
The device must remain on the reservoir during the entire bleeding procedure
-2-1- Open the bleeder screw at the Front Left wheel
-3-3- Start the FR bleeding procedure and wait for 110s
-2-4- When there is no more air bubble, close the bleeding screw and go to step 3
-3-1- Open the bleeder screw at the Front Right wheel
-2-3- Start the FL bleeding procedure and wait for 25s
-3-4- When there is no more air bubble, close the bleeding screw and go to step 4
-4-4- When there is no more air bubble, close the bleeding screw and then stop the bleeding
-4-1- Open the bleeder screw at the Rear Right wheel
-4-3- Start the RR bleeding procedure and wait for 86s
- STEP5 - => END OF THE BLEEDING PROCEDURE
-5-1- Remove the device on the brake fluid reservoir
WARNING : Do not perform the hydraulic circuit control if the hydraulic circuit is not well filled-in.
To check if the hydraulic circuit is well filled-in:
If the pedal is hard, you can perform the hydraulic circuit control
- Stop the engine and press 3 times the brake pedal:
If the pedal is soft : air is present in the primary hydraulic circuit ==> perform the hydraulic bleeding procedure
A - Keep pressed the brake pedal
C - Start the routine control by pushing the button of the approprate wheel (routine time = 4 sec)
B - Another person have to try to manually turn the wheel to test
Remark : Routines have to be started one by one (simultaneous controls are forbidden)
D - During the routine, if the selected wheel is successively blocked/unblocked ==> Control is OK

Message.Text: Appuyer sur la pédale de frein et tourner manuellement la roue AVD
Appuyer sur la pédale de frein et tourner manuellement la roue AVG
Appuyer sur la pédale de frein et tourner manuellement la roue ARD
Appuyer sur la pédale de frein et tourner manuellement la roue ARG

Label.Text: A reset of the totalizer odometer is only allowed after a driving test in the following situation:
- Totalizer odometer has not been reset more than 2 times

Label.Text: Hydraulic valves and pump control - permanent activation (90 sec.)

Display.DataName: IOControl.Output command status

Input.DataName: Hydraulic valves and pump.outlet EV RR
Hydraulic valves and pump.inlet EV RR
Hydraulic valves and pump.outlet EV RL
Hydraulic valves and pump.inlet EV RL
Hydraulic valves and pump.outlet EV FR
Hydraulic valves and pump.intlet EV FR
Hydraulic valves and pump.outlet EV FL
Hydraulic valves and pump.inlet EV FL
Hydraulic valves and pump.FL RR Electric shuttle EV
Hydraulic valves and pump.FR RL Electric shuttle EV
Hydraulic valves and pump.FL RR Isolating EV
Hydraulic valves and pump.FR RL Isolating EV

Label.Text: 1- Select the wheel to check (the wheel speed sensor shall not be in failure)
96 poles are detected --> No tone failure
2- Turn the wheel selected to do exactly 1 wheel revolution without coming back in inverse rotation direction
Less than 96 poles (result is pair) --> Tone must be replaced
More than 96 poles --> The control routine has failed, try again from step 1
3- Stop the routine or select another wheel from step 1
Number of poles is impair --> Re perform the counting from step 1

Display.DataName: Routine.Output command status
Routine.Selected wheel
Routine.Counting result

Label.Text: -1- This screen shall be used to measure the consumption peak and max value during an ABS braking control
-2- Connect the measurement device to the ECU and click on the START button.
-3- When the measurment is finished, click on STOP
NOTE: The control will automatically stop after a 30s continuous activation of the relays
